author: codex-root

patch.value:
## Priority order

1. Priority-zero and priority-one stories and decisions.
2. SDK-first and CLI simplification delivery chains.
3. Context engine, scale, history integrity, releases, packages, and governance.
4. Remaining active features, tasks, chores, plans, issues, and reminders.

## Batch contract

Snapshot; claim; bounded finding set; exact operations; dry-run validation; mutation; post-checks; evidence comment; metric delta; cursor checkpoint; release.
Wave 1 active graph enrichment: connect strategic stories, decisions, delivery slices, evidence, and execution order from reviewed findings
Apply only high-confidence, evidence-backed relationship changes to active items and verify each bounded batch before continuing.

Consume only reviewed Wave 0 findings and accepted edge semantics; every operation includes source evidence, confidence, author, and rationale; Prioritize story-to-delivery, decision-to-implementation, prerequisite ordering, discovered-from, evidence, release, incident, and SDK-to-adapter relationships; Partition work by canonical lineage and bounded item count so agents can claim non-overlapping batches and resume from durable cursors; Each batch runs duplicate, semantic graph, lifecycle, history-drift, and health validation and records graph-quality and token-context deltas; Low-confidence and conflicting cases remain investigations or waivers; no generic related edge is added solely for connectivity; Finish when every active item has a reviewed classification and either valid relationships, an intentional-isolate waiver, or an explicit remediation owner
Make active execution and strategy lineages richly traversable without adding arbitrary density
Agents gain reliable prerequisite, delivery, decision, evidence, and impact paths for current work first
Improves claim-next, planning, context assembly, duplicate prevention, handoffs, and blast-radius reasoning
Reviewed active-item relationship batches with before and after metrics, immutable evidence, and no unexplained policy violations
Active work has the highest context value and lowest changelog risk, while several bodies already provide direct evidence for missing prerequisites

value.author: codex-root
value.text: Duplicate check 2026-07-13: no existing open item owns systematic evidence-backed active-item relationship enrichment across capability lineages; existing epics own their features while this task owns only cross-lineage graph remediation batches.

message: Create Wave 1 active graph enrichment task
